# Christopher Wenzlick

> Full Stack & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer specializing in healthcare data integration, C#/.NET, React, and Azure DevOps.

## Pages
- /: Portfolio home with bio, featured projects, and skills overview
- /projects: Full project list with search and skill filtering
- /skills: Technologies organized by category
- /contact: Contact links (email, GitHub, LinkedIn)
